steps.title: Use the point (0, 18) to relate a and b
Use the zero condition g(-18) = 0
steps.content:
When a rational function equals zero, its numerator must be zero (with denominator non-zero). Substitute $x = -18$ into the numerator:
$$(-18)^2 - (-18) - a = 0$$
$$324 + 18 - a = 0$$
$$a = 342$$

steps.title: Solve for b
steps.content:
From Step 1: $a = 18b$
From Step 2: $a = 342$
Combine these equations:
$$18b = 342$$
$$b = \frac{342}{18} = 19$$
That matches Choice A.
